text: Literally, ‘direct’ in the Latin version, ‘weigh’ in the Hebrew text. The Hebrew verb is ordinarily interpreted ‘smooth out’, but it is difficult to see the relevance of such a metaphor here.

The words enclosed in brackets are found in the Septuagint Greek, but not in the Hebrew text. They have perhaps been misplaced by accident; evidently they do not suit the thought of the present passage.
